doubtful_osteoarthritis: The knee X-ray shows normal bone structure and joint space, resembling a healthy knee rather than doubtful osteoarthritis.
There is clear joint space narrowing and prominent osteophyte formation, features more typical of moderate osteoarthritis.
The image displays marked loss of joint space and large bone spurs, mimicking severe osteoarthritis.
Well-preserved cartilage and absence of bone deformity are present, which may be confused with a healthy knee.
Definite radiographic changes such as sclerosis and mild deformity are seen, resembling minimal or moderate osteoarthritis.
healthy_knee: The knee X-ray shows subtle joint space narrowing and tiny osteophytes, which may be mistaken for minimal osteoarthritis.
There are ambiguous changes and minor irregularities, features more typical of doubtful osteoarthritis.
The image displays clear joint space narrowing and moderate bone spur formation, mimicking moderate osteoarthritis.
Marked loss of joint space and large osteophytes are present, resembling severe osteoarthritis.
Mild sclerosis and faint bone deformity are seen, which could be confused with early osteoarthritis.
minimal_osteoarthritis: The knee X-ray shows normal bone structure and joint space, resembling a healthy knee.
There are only ambiguous changes and questionable irregularities, features more typical of doubtful osteoarthritis.
Clear joint space narrowing and moderate osteophyte formation are present, mimicking moderate osteoarthritis.

Well-preserved cartilage and absence of bone deformity are present, which may be confused with a healthy knee.
moderate_osteoarthritis: The knee X-ray shows normal joint space and bone structure, resembling a healthy knee.
